source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.7 (1,1,1,7)
distilled_thesis: Depth is the destination-symbol of descent, the lower direction that gift must take.
